title: Elastic Announces New Security Analytics Features

main_header.title_l10n: Elastic Announces New Security Analytics Features
main_header.subtitle_l10n: New capabilities help security teams detect and respond to threats faster

intro_paragraph_l10n: Elastic today announced new security analytics features designed to help organizations detect and respond to cyber threats more effectively.
paragraph_l10n:
The new features include advanced threat detection rules, improved investigation workflows, and enhanced integration with cloud security tools.

These capabilities build on Elastic Security's unified approach to SIEM, endpoint security, and cloud security.
